summary: Build 214 is a LOCAL-ONLY packet that CAPTURES Jason's fresh, signed, per-attempt approval for ONE Jason-operated controlled live roofer SMS send using the Build 213 fixed/guarded R1 message binding (variant R1, new_lead_fast_response_alert). The prior approval was consumed and expired after the Build 212 attempt, so a NEW fresh signed approval is required before any one-message attempt. This packet records approval_signed=true and approval_granted=true together with the exact approved scope (one SMS, SMS-only, no retry, no homeowner contact, no live automation activation, no unrestricted launch, no production data, destination entered silently outside repo/chat/logs, secrets/phone numbers not recorded, guarded message binding required, outbound body must equal the approved R1 message exactly, send-time preflight required, approval expires after one attempt whether sent or failed). It records the next decision packet (R1_GUARDED_SIGNED_APPROVAL_CAPTURED_SEND_TIME_PREFLIGHT_REQUIRED, recommended_next_option=run_send_time_preflight_then_one_guarded_jason_operated_sms_attempt, authorizes_send_now=false) and a fail-closed send-time preflight checklist that additionally verifies the guarded resolved outbound body equals the approved R1 text and is not the stale generic delivery-test copy. This build performs NO live action: no SMS, no Twilio, no Twilio client, no messages.create, no network/external call, no retry, no roofer/homeowner contact, no confirm-token arming, no live-runner live execution, and reads/records NO secret values, SIDs, tokens, credential values, phone numbers, or production data. Capturing approval does NOT send. The immediate next step is a send-time preflight, then exactly one guarded Jason-operated SMS attempt. Launch remains pilot-gated, NOT unrestricted. Safety posture preserved: demo_ready_with_live_automation_disabled.

guarded_runner_binding_reference.binding_note: The Build 213 fixed/guarded runner resolves its outbound body from the approved selected variant text (the immutable approved R1 record) and a fail-closed guard blocks any send whose body is not exactly the approved R1 text (explicitly rejecting the stale generic delivery-test copy). The Build 214 read-only verifier proves, dynamically and side-effect-free, that the runner's resolved outbound body equals THIS packet's approved_message_text (R1) and is not the generic copy. Requiring the runner module performs no send and no exit.

signed_approval_capture_evidence.approved_message_text: RoofLeadHQ: New roofing lead just came in. A quick first reply now helps you reach them while they're still looking. Reply STOP to opt out.
signed_approval_capture_evidence.selected_variant_text: RoofLeadHQ: New roofing lead just came in. A quick first reply now helps you reach them while they're still looking. Reply STOP to opt out.
signed_approval_capture_evidence.exact_approval_statement_text: I, Jason Lohse, approve one Jason-operated controlled live roofer SMS send using the Build 213 fixed/guarded R1 message binding only. Approved message: "RoofLeadHQ: New roofing lead just came in. A quick first reply now helps you reach them while they're still looking. Reply STOP to opt out." Scope: one SMS only, SMS-only, no retry, no homeowner contact, no live automation activation, no unrestricted launch, no production data, no secrets/phone numbers recorded in repo/chat/logs, destination entered silently outside repo/chat/logs, send-time preflight required before any attempt, guarded message binding must verify the outbound body exactly equals the approved R1 text, and approval expires after one attempt whether sent or failed.
signed_approval_capture_evidence.approval_capture_notes: This captures Jason's fresh, per-attempt signed approval for exactly ONE Jason-operated, SMS-only live roofer send of variant R1 using the Build 213 fixed/guarded message binding. Capturing the approval does NOT send anything and does NOT arm any confirm token. A send-time preflight is required before any attempt, and the guarded message binding must verify the resolved outbound body exactly equals the approved R1 text (and is not the stale generic delivery-test copy) before any send. The approval is single-use and expires after one attempt whether the send succeeds or fails. No secret values, SIDs, tokens, phone numbers, or production data are recorded by capturing this approval.

send_time_preflight_checklist.purpose: Fail-closed send-time preflight checklist Jason would follow OUTSIDE this build, AFTER this captured approval and BEFORE the one guarded Jason-operated SMS attempt. This build performs none of these steps. No secret values, phone numbers, SIDs, or tokens are read or recorded here.
checklist: convert destination to E.164 outside repo/chat/logs
verify approved message equals R1 exactly
verify guarded resolved outbound body equals approved R1 exactly
verify resolved outbound body is not generic delivery-test copy

homeowner_facing_copy_boundary.note: This approval is for one roofer-facing R1 SMS only. No homeowner-facing message is approved, consented, or to be sent. Any homeowner-facing message requires separate, explicit consent capture and a separate signed approval.
